creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
(In reply to Osamu Matsuda from comment #1)


I changed --no-system-nghttp2 with --system-nghttp2 but I get this:


-- Installing: /usr/ports/devel/cmake-core/work/stage/usr/local/share/emacs/site-lisp/cmake-mode.el
